name: Ground Beef Oriental
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the ground beef with salt and pepper.
2. Brown the beef in 2 tablespoons cooking oil over medium heat until no longer pink, stirring occasionally.
3. Add chopped onions and celery to the pan; cook for about 5 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
4. In a separate bowl, mix together the soups, soy sauce, water, rice, and half of the noodles.
5. Transfer the mixture into an oiled casserole dish, covering with the remaining noodles.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30 minutes.
7. Uncover the dish and bake for another 30 minutes.
8. Return the dish to the oven and cover again; add the remaining noodles on top and bake for an additional 15 minutes.
9. Serve hot, garnished with extra herbs or vegetables if desired.
Total cooking time: 1 hour and 15 minutes.
